title: Uruguayan-Style Beef Skewers with Sweet Smoky Glaze
description: A flavorful and tender beef skewer dish with a sweet smoky glaze inspired by Uruguayan cuisine. Perfect for a quick and delicious dinner or barbecue.
instructions: Thread beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
In a small bowl, whisk together BBQ sauce, honey, and soy sauce. Set aside.
Brush both sides of the beef skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until beef reaches an internal temperature of 135°F for medium-rare.
During the last 2 minutes of grilling, brush the skewers with the sweet smoky glaze.
Remove skewers from grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Note: If using wooden skewers, soak them in water for 30 minutes before grilling to prevent burning.
